start.speaker: brother_maren
start.text: You return. Good. The Light does not abandon those who seek it — even if what they find is... uncomfortable.

options.text: You mentioned evening prayers. May I attend?
Tell me about 'the old ways' that came before the Church.
I have other matters to attend to.

prayer_invitation.speaker: brother_maren
prayer_invitation.text: You are welcome at vespers. Come at dusk — I lead the faithful in meditation. You will see the chapel as it was meant to be used. And perhaps... you will see something the faithless cannot.

old_ways.speaker: brother_maren
old_ways.text: Before the Ashen Light, these lands worshipped the forest. Blood and sap, root and bone. The druids served as intermediaries between men and the green will beneath the soil.

old_ways_2.speaker: brother_maren
old_ways_2.text: The Church burned their groves and scattered their circles. We brought civilization. But the forest... the forest has a long memory. And old covenants do not die simply because new faiths decree it.

midnight_reminder.speaker: brother_maren
midnight_reminder.text: Come to the chapel when the village sleeps. The cellar door will be unlocked. What I have to show you cannot be spoken of in daylight — there are too many ears in Ashvale.
